channel.title: big-data on ExampleSite
channel.description: Recent content in big-data on ExampleSite

item.title: Google's three big data technologies: GFS, Bigtable and MapReduce
item.description: Have you wondered about the inner workings of big data? How parallel and distributed computing work? In this post we will have a look at Google’s three early works in the 2000s that are the basis of Apache Hadoop: the Google File System (GFS), Bigtable and MapReduce. As the Internet rapidly developed in the late 90s, it soon became impractical for many enterprises to store and analyze all of their data on a single machine.
